feed.title: SAP Community - BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing
feed.subtitle: BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IW38 change main work centers mass change
entry.content: Is it possible to change all the main work centers to an diffrent main work center with an mass change? Please let me know.

entry.title: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but there is data to be processed
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a data flow from one standard ADSO to another standard ADSO via an InfoSource. Both transformations have SQLScript Expert Routines. I went ahead and created a full DTP with a filter on 0CALMONTH. When I run the DTP, no data is retrieved nor processed. If I run the full DTP without a filter, the load runs fine. I'm sure the source has data for the selection because I'm able to see records for the same filter selection in the HANA Database Explorer. If I create an intermediate ADSO to "stage" the data inbetween, both transformations routines run fine and are able to load data to and from the intermediate ADSO. Any ideas what might be causing the issue with the InfoSource flow?

 

EDIT: I added a screenshot of the DTP Monitor

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform.  I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

          TRY.
              IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
                RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
*                  MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
                exporting
                  msgid           = 'BRAIN'
                  msgno           = '642'
                  msgty           = sy-msgty
                  attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
              ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
            CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
              MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
          ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv

entry.title: remove space at end of the target field MAT_PLANT in sap bw transformation level
entry.content:
i have been getting space in MAT_PLANT field at end of the name it has different type of naming conventions like '0000000334455' and fiew with text model like  E2S5T10, VALLWH... etc like wise however actual flow is DS-->DSO1-->DSO2-->MP  DS to DSO1 There is a function module to remove space and add '.' dot . but bringing the records  to DSO1 ex:

record 1 has  'VALLWH' and plant 5000 and

record 2 'VALLWH  '  plant 5001

then after transformation it bringing like

record 1  'VALLWH' and plant 5000 and

record 2 'VALLWH  '  plant 5001

record 3 'VALLWH.'  plant 5001

i tried all the possible ways to  remove trailing and leading space with field routine and formula between DSO1 to DSO2  like REPLACE ...RTRIM,CONDESE, SHIFT LEFT ect but couldnt find the solution i am not sure What is the cause and why am not able to removing it please experts help me on this at Target field MAT_PLANT

entry.title: HOW TO ADD NEW FIELD IN EXISTED CUBE AT TRANSFORMATION LEVEL AND FILL WITH LOOK UP DSO
entry.content:
Hi experts 

please help me on this ,

i have new development requirement. there is an existed flow as DS --DSO1-DSO2-INFOCUBE in sap bw i have to add new field to INFOCUBE directly (no mapping in transoformation level)and which should get data from some other dso say DSO3 with lookup method(ex say: 0DOC_DATE ) using matching key fields and apply and move these changes to development to quality please explain me the step by step approach with example if possible

Thanks in Advance..

entry.title: PC failed recovery steps
entry.content:
Hi experts ,

i have been facing the DSO Failed in process chain with space issue . while checking its getting data from another DSO, AS shown in below flow from that same source dso its loading to another two flows , among those one flow completed till cube level, another OHD is loading ,now how can i recover the below failed (RED). Explain me or please provide me the relevant source to recovery this scenario.

Thanks in advance,

VIJAY

entry.title: Datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in a S4/HANA system
entry.content:
Hello,

we have used the datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in a release with product EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0. This datasource is related to table T25A0.

Now we have a S4/HANA system (product version SAP S/4HANA 2023). The table T25A0 is still there, but we miss the datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in the BI content.

Any idea?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: BW4HANA Goods Movement from Inventory Management (2LIS_03_BF) load without Stock initialization da
entry.content: I want to transfer all historical material movements from corporite adso to inventory adso, I don't need initial stock, all movements are already in corporite dso, should the dtp extraction mod Full and dtp setting Historical Transactions in the first transfer? Or would it be enough to run it directly without the DTP setting as Historical Transactions?

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform. I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

TRY.
IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
* MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
exporting
msgid = 'BRAIN'
msgno = '642'
msgty = sy-msgty
attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv

entry.title: BW Bridge: In what schema can I find table TFACS?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to use the WORKDAYS_BETWEEN function an AMDP transformation routine in BW Bridge. I get an error that the TFACS table cannot be found in the schema when I try to load some data. I found the TFACS table in BW Bridge using the search, but there is no schema mentioned there. Also, when I try to preview the data of TFACS, I get an error that I'm not authorized to do so. I used the Datasphere Database Explorer as an alternative to test my SQL, but I get the same error. Any idea of how I can find the schema and resolve this issue?

entry.title: Training, practice, free usage of system
entry.content: Where I can get free access to the online, live platform where I can practice platform ? ( I would like to get into industry but cant find free access to the platform where I can practice some transactions. Please help.

entry.title: Duplicate date in EDW - Stock /B4R/DIM50
entry.content:
Hi All,

The issue is related to Stock ADSO in BW. We had to perform a reload to /B4R/DIM50 ADSO for one posting date because of technical issue where data was deleted. As part of this we identified the Mat Doc from PSA compared it with MKPF for the same posting date and have reloaded the missing documents.

This activity went fine and most of the records were updated correctly but since DIM50 ADSO doesn't have Mat docs and has only Materials I believe some were not deleted when initial deletion issue took place, this led to duplicate data in the ADSO. Now we are unable to identify the list of store article combinations where the issues\receipts doubled or duplicated. only when a user raises an issue for his store-article we are getting to know the duplicated ones.

This standard ADSO doesn't have Posting date selection for deletion so we cannot entire drop and reload for one posting date. So, is there a way where we could identify the impacted list of store - articles for the posting date by comparison with any table (tried MB5B and MARD in S4) and also perform a reload. 

Regards,

Srinivas

entry.title: Options from SAP to archive HCM employee historical records
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone suggest what solutions/services SAP has given to store HCM employee historical data from non-sap legacy system? or in other words if client is moving from non-SAP system to SAP SuccessFactors, then where can employee history from non-SAP legacy system can be archived in SAP ecosystem/landscape?

I know about third party options like OpenText, Snowflake, google cloud etc. but I am wondering what storage options has SAP has given for SAP customers? Also, has anyone seen SAP HANA Cloud database/Postgre (Data services of SAP BTP) used to archive historical records?

Also, can SAP ILM be used for this purpose? As per my understanding SAP ILM is mostly suited for existing SAP customers i.e., who want to archive data from their ECC (Sap legacy system). SAP ILM is not a flexible option if we want to archive data from a non-SAP system.

Regards,

entry.title: Wave management
entry.content:
Hi, we have SAP S4 Hana including EWM.

Trucks comes for loading with two different destinations for unloading (2 different customer orders). We release the wave, but the issue is that both customer orders are released in the wave. Is there a possibility to first release wave for one customer order and then remaining wave for the second customer order instead of all at once?

Thank you very much for your response.

entry.title: Material Description in Adobe Form not showing line breaks – All text appearing in single line
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I’m working on an Adobe Form for invoice printing, and I have a requirement related to the Material Description field inside the line items.

This field is a free text field — sometimes users maintain multiple lines of text using the Enter key (i.e., line breaks). For example:

 

Line 1
Line 2
Line 3
However, in the PDF output, all the text is appearing in a single line, like:
Line 1Line 2Line 3
 

My Requirement:

If the user presses Enter while maintaining the Material Description, I want the output in the PDF form to preserve those line breaks, so the result should appear like this:

Line 1
Line 2
Line 3

Request for Help:

Can anyone please suggest what changes I need to make in either:

  • The Adobe Form layout, or

  • The ABAP driver program

    to achieve this behavior?

    I want this to work dynamically — i.e., I don’t want to hardcode anything. The output should respect whatever line breaks are maintained in the source.

    Thanks in advance for your guidance! 🙏

entry.title: Eclipse ADT crashes by splash screen on Mac due to eclipse.ini "--module-path..."
entry.content:
I was able to use Eclipse ADT 2022-12 for SAP GUI Java on macOS without issues four days ago. I updated it with 2025-03 but also I got still old version and both of them giving me same error. 

It crashes after splash screen and I can't reach even the eclipse interface.

In the eclipse.ini file inside the application contents, I have previously added long time ago the following lines to enable SAP GUI integration within Eclipse ( SAP notes 2971147 )

--module-path=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/javafx-sdk-21/lib
--add-exports=javafx.web/com.sun.webkit.dom=ALL-UNNAMED

 Now, I explored something about this issue;

If I remove the first line(--module-path..) from eclipse.ini file, Eclipse starts and works basically. But this time, SAP GUI java can not run on application.

entry.title: Data Extraction from SAP ECC using Multiple tables
entry.content:
We have a requirement to extract the data from SAP ECC , which involves multiple tables involved in it around 10 tables and also involve loop logic from one table to another. What is the best approach to perform this ?

Is there any other way beyond ABAP program? I mean can we write SQL without installing any other tool?

Note : Client doesn't allow any external tools like BODS and all. Because they are going to decommission SAP soon . They don't want to use SAP BW or BODS. They want us to just extract the data from multiple tables like Vendor data from LFA1, LFBW,LFB1,LFM1,ADRC,ADR6 and LFBK. table. 

This is the first time i am posting the question. apologies if i tagged someone wrongly.

entry.title: S_TABU_LIN object not being checked -> failed to load data
entry.content:
Alright, so this is a weird question, because I got it to work in one BW (SAP Business Warehouse) 4/HANA system but not in another.

The task is simple and I will simplify it even further: You have an InfoObject ZTEST with two attributes which don't matter. There are two values we will load into it using master data maintenance: 00000 and 00001. One user called USER_1 is supposed to only see and maintain the value 00000 and another user should only see and maintain the value 00001 in the master data maintenance. I want to reiterate, that I already got this to work in one system but I am clueless as to why it's not working in another one.

Now we do the spicy stuff, we use this little thing here:

The master data maintenance with authorization check. Now because I analyzed this thing for quite some time now, I know what it does. The user that logs into the cockpit is now checked against S_TABU_NAM and S_TABU_LIN. In my old system, you were also checked against S_RS_IOMAD but in the new one, you're instead checked against S_TABU_DIS for some reason, but you're not anymore if you have S_TABU_NAM already. So S_TABU_NAM gives you access to the table and suddenly it asks for S_TABU_CLI too which is fine, it wants you to be able to maintain cross-client tables, okay. Now the interesting bit is S_TABU_LIN.

When we activated the authorization check, it automatically created an activated a corresponding organization criterion that it will check against to see if you have access to the individual rows. It also only checks for 02 - Change. Now, if I put in "*" as the value in my custom role for the authorization object S_TABU_LIN, it will work fine. My test user can see all rows. If you remove S_TABU_LIN, it will say "no data" and in the authorization trace, you can see that it checked for the existence of S_TABU_LIN and didn't find it.

Everything as expected until now. If I put in 00000 as the only value in the authorization object, it doesn't display anything and instead shows "failed to load data". Looking at the trace we see... nothing. It checks for the existence of S_TABU_LIN but no further checks. In fact, the test user passes all checks the system gives it but they still don't see any data. Again, in my old system this simply worked, the test user say one line with 00000 and the other row was simply not displayed.

What can cause this? How can I get this to work? The task seems easy and standard enough to be common, but I find no information on anyone even knowing what "master data maintenance with authorization checks" actually does.

Thanks for any hint or trace on how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Enable field from structure to data source 0FI_ACDOCA_10
entry.content:
Hi Team

there is requirement to add the fields to 0FI_ACDOCA_10, those fields already avaliable in the structure - FINS_ACDOCA_BW. how can we get those fields to 0FI_ACDOCA_10. Please suggest us.

 

Thanks,

Dinesh.

entry.title: HANA Calculated coulmn to derive sum of Quantity
entry.content:
Hi HANA Gurus,

Greetings.

I have a HANA Calculation View with attributes( VBELN, POSNR, Packing_Station ) Measure LFIMG(Delivered quantity). Now the requirement to create a calculated column Total Delivered Quantity (Sum of based on Packing_station value).

In this example i need to create calculated column =64+11872+4128=16062 (expected Result).

How to achive this calculation . I welcome your valuable inputs.Thanks!
